Our Story

More than just coffee

We're a haven for connection, creativity, and community — nestled in the heart of Janakpuri. Every detail of our space is designed to make you feel at home, from the botanical wall art to the marble tabletops.

Whether you're seeking a quiet corner to unwind with your favourite brew, catching up with friends over a plate of momos, or simply craving a moment of caffeinated bliss — Just Another Bru is your escape.

100% Vegetarian Open Daily Dine-in Takeaway
